'''âr-ng-j''' ('''karangaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tudorise|tudorise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tudorise|tudorise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| karangaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirangaj|thirangaj]] || [[word:jirangaj|jirangaj]] || [[word:shirangaj|shirangaj]] || [[word:kirangaj|kirangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurangaj|thuthurangaj]] || [[word:jujurangaj|jujurangaj]] || [[word:shushurangaj|shushurangaj]] || [[word:kukurangaj|kukurangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurangaj|thurangaj]] || [[word:jurangaj|jurangaj]] || [[word:shurangaj|shurangaj]] || [[word:kurangaj|kurangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurangaj|thurangaj]] || [[word:jurangaj|jurangaj]] || [[word:shurangaj|shurangaj]] || [[word:kurangaj|kurangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therangaj|therangaj]] || [[word:jerangaj|jerangaj]] || [[word:sherangaj|sherangaj]] || [[word:kerangaj|kerangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorangaj|thothorangaj]] || [[word:jojorangaj|jojorangaj]] || [[word:shoshorangaj|shoshorangaj]] || [[word:kokorangaj|kokorangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorangaj|thorangaj]] || [[word:jorangaj|jorangaj]] || [[word:shorangaj|shorangaj]] || [[word:korangaj|korangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorangaj|thorangaj]] || [[word:jorangaj|jorangaj]] || [[word:shorangaj|shorangaj]] || [[word:korangaj|korangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrangaj|thĂŠrangaj]] || [[word:jĂŠrangaj|jĂŠrangaj]] || [[word:shĂŠrangaj|shĂŠrangaj]] || [[word:kĂŠrangaj|kĂŠrangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharangaj|thatharangaj]] || [[word:jajarangaj|jajarangaj]] || [[word:shasharangaj|shasharangaj]] || [[word:kakarangaj|kakarangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharangaj|tharangaj]] || [[word:jarangaj|jarangaj]] || [[word:sharangaj|sharangaj]] || [[word:karangaj|karangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharangaj|tharangaj]] || [[word:jarangaj|jarangaj]] || [[word:sharangaj|sharangaj]] || [[word:karangaj|karangaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharangaj|sharangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharangaj|gosharangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharangaj|gokisharangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharangajnĂŒ|sharangajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharangajnknĂŒ|gosharangajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangajnĂŒ|gokisharangajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharangajshĂ«|sharangajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharangajnkshĂ«|gosharangajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharangajshĂ«|gokisharangajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangajro|sharangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangajnkro|gosharangajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangajro|gokisharangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangajmu|sharangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangajnkmu|gosharangajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangajmu|gokisharangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharangajsher|sharangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharangajnksher|gosharangajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharangajsher|gokisharangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharangajng|sharangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharangajnkng|gosharangajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharangajng|gokisharangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharangajya|sharangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharangajnkya|gosharangajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharangajya|gokisharangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharangajyam|sharangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharangajnkyam|gosharangajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharangajyam|gokisharangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangajnĂŒshĂ«|sharangajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangajnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharangajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangajnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharangajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangajnĂŒro|sharangajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangajnknĂŒro|gosharangajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangajnĂŒro|gokisharangajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangajnĂŒmu|sharangajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangajnknĂŒmu|gosharangajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangajnĂŒmu|gokisharangajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangajshĂ«nĂŒ|sharangajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharangajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharangajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangajshĂ«ro|sharangajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangajnkshĂ«ro|gosharangajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangajshĂ«ro|gokisharangajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangajshĂ«mu|sharangajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangajnkshĂ«mu|gosharangajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangajshĂ«mu|gokisharangajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangajronĂŒ|sharangajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangajnkronĂŒ|gosharangajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangajronĂŒ|gokisharangajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangajroshĂ«|sharangajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangajnkroshĂ«|gosharangajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangajroshĂ«|gokisharangajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangajromu|sharangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangajnkromu|gosharangajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangajromu|gokisharangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangajmunĂŒ|sharangajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangajnkmunĂŒ|gosharangajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangajmunĂŒ|gokisharangajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangajmushĂ«|sharangajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangajnkmushĂ«|gosharangajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangajmushĂ«|gokisharangajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangajmuro|sharangajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangajnkmuro|gosharangajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangajmuro|gokisharangajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
